message:
rpc: extension event dispatch in prompt handler

Add extension lifecycle event dispatch to RPC prompt execution:

Extension imports:
- ExtensionEventName, extension_event_from_agent from extensions module

Event handler refactoring:
- Moved event_handler construction inside session lock block
- Captures extensions reference from session guard
- Dispatches agent events to extensions after JSON serialization
- Uses runtime_for_events for async spawn

Input event dispatch:
- Fires Input event with { text: message } payload before prompt
- Fires BeforeAgentStart event after Input
- Positioned after session lock acquired, before run_text_with_abort

This ensures RPC mode has feature parity with interactive and print
modes for extension lifecycle events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
